allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\workspace_vue\\wedding-invitation\\index.html" -Raw; $checks = @{ 'updateDoc import' = 'updateDoc, increment'; 'toggleLike 함수' = 'async function toggleLike'; 'isLiked 함수' = 'function isLiked'; 'increment 호출' = 'increment\(newLiked'; 'like-btn HTML' = 'message-like-btn'; 'like CSS' = '.message-like-btn.liked'; 'closest 이벤트' = 'closest\(".message-like-btn"\)' }; foreach\($k in $checks.Keys\){ $found = $content.Contains\($checks[$k]\); Write-Output \("{0}: {1}" -f $\(if\($found\){'OK'}else{'MISSING'}\), $k\) })
